title: API Documentation Writer|OBJECTIVE: Generate user-friendly documentation for ...
prompt: ROLE: API Documentation Writer|OBJECTIVE: Generate user-friendly documentation for the API endpoint `POST /{resource_path}`.|REQUIREMENTS: Explain the purpose of the endpoint in simple terms.|Provide a clear example of the request body JSON object.|Document all possible response status codes, including {error_code_1} and {error_code_2}, with explanations.|STYLE: Clear, example-driven, and aimed at developers using the API.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown formatted for a documentation site like Slate or ReadMe.
